# James Tannahill — Contact & Location

> Contact page and interactive map for James Tannahill, Intelligent Capital at xAI.

## contact.jamestannahill.com

A structured contact page for James Tannahill. Includes venture links (Plocamium Holdings, 1nessAgency, MonkeyThorn Meet, gOOOvy, NewYorkLab, HMU API, RDLB), social profiles (LinkedIn, GitHub, X/Twitter), and a contact form via HMU API.

Contact API: https://hmuapi.com/api/u/jamestannahill

## map.jamestannahill.com

An interactive Mapbox map showing James Tannahill's location in New York City, with a tactical business card layout and MECARD QR code for contact sharing.

## About

James Tannahill — jamestannahill.com
Intelligent Capital at xAI. Founder of Plocamium Holdings.
